gist.headline: Cosmo joins the chat
gist.blurb: Say hola to Soy Cosmo, a new WhatsApp personal assistant powered by Pollinations! It generates images and audio right in your chats.
gist.summary: Added Soy Cosmo, a WhatsApp-based personal assistant that uses Pollinations for image and audio generation, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and try out Soy Cosmo directly from our community apps list.
gist.visual_concept: Soy Cosmo is a WhatsApp bot. Visuals should include a smartphone, chat bubbles, and a space/cosmos theme for 'Cosmo'. The bee mascot interacts with the phone.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky retro smartphone displaying a green chat bubble, with a cute little robot named Cosmo waving from the screen. The friendly bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny paintbrush. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm.
